title: Warden dimension mod
description: A mod that adds the warden dimension
body:
# Description
> This new 2024 **Warden dimension** mod offers you an amazing Minecraft experience with new biomes, new wood types, new mobs/blocks and a lot of new structures.


# Feasures 
1.   The mod inculdes new blocks sutch as the sculk rock **(sculk rock slab/stair/button/smooth sculk rock and sculk rock brick)** and sculk soil and echo ore.
2.   It also includes two new wood types **("dark wood" and "silent wood")** and their set **(stair/slab/log/wood block/pressure plate/button/fence/fence gate)**.
3. You will also find many new structures like the *silent ruins* / *ancient city remnant* / *village ruins* / *ruined dungeon* / *sculk temple* and way more.
4. The new mobs include a new boss "the *Guardian Of The Temple*" / "Sculkified Farmer" and "Sculkified villager" and "sculk mite".
5. it also contains 16 New tools and items, 10 New advancements, and a new poition effect (drikable/throable/lingering and arows).

Chek the Photo Gallery to see more!
